GRC Practice Lab
Features Frameworks YouTube
The #1 Free GRC Learning Platform

Master GRC with
Hands-On Practice

The complete Governance, Risk & Compliance practice environment. Learn by doing — manage risks, implement controls, collect evidence, and build your GRC portfolio. No theory only. Real practice.

Risk Management

Create risk registers, assess likelihood & impact, build heat maps, and track treatments. Learn the full risk lifecycle.

Control Testing

Design tests, document results, link to evidence. Practice control assessment like a real auditor.

480+ Framework Controls

ISO 27001, ISO 42001, NIST CSF, SOC 2, PCI DSS, HIPAA, GDPR, CIS — all pre-loaded and ready to map.

Evidence Collection

Attach screenshots, documents, and logs. Build an audit-ready evidence repository.

Incident Response

Log incidents, track investigations, document lessons learned. Practice IR workflows.

Portfolio Builder

Export your work, generate reports, and showcase your GRC skills to employers.
